title: Preparation of s/o/w Emulsion Using SPG Membrane
author: Daisuke Yasui
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6edhba6

steps.title: Prepare 10 mL half-saline and add 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 10 mL half-saline and add 0.08 mg of Polyoxyethylene hydrogenated castor oil 60 (HCO 60). Use a starler to make the solution.

steps.title: Aspirate the solution to 10mL syringe...
steps.instruction: Aspirate the solution to 10mL syringe and connect it to a filter kit with 20μm hydrophilic-coated SPG membrage(SPG Technology Co.,Ltd). Push the whole solution into the filter kit.

steps.title: Aspirate 3 mL of Lipiodol (Gurbet,...
steps.instruction: Aspirate 3 mL of Lipiodol (Gurbet, Villepinte, France) in a syringe and add it to the bottle of miriplatin (Dainippon Sumitomo Pharma, Osaka, Japan), thus prepare miriplatin suspension.

steps.title: Aspirate miriplatin suspension with a syringe...
steps.instruction: Aspirate miriplatin suspension with a syringe and connect to the filter kit, which was prepared in step 2. First, aspirate air in the system and then set a syringe to a syringe pump. Set stirler beneath the filter kit. Start a syringe pump with a speed of 20ml/hr and start a stirler at the same time with a speed of 300rpm.

steps.title: Increase the speed of stirler by 200ppm every 5 minuites
steps.instruction: Increase the speed of stirler by 200ppm every 5 minuites.
